corpus: C0 — curated references (the records the project retriever returns over references/)
description: Frozen query set for the retrieval-v1 lexical baseline (docs/benchmarks/retrieval-v1.md). Data, not code; frozen per benchmark version. Changing it mints retrieval-v2. Each query is judged against source records in judgments/retrieval-v1.json, never against generated prose.

queries.expected_behavior: Retrieve the exact canonical span at rank 1.
queries.notes: Exact source-text lookup; the phrase is verbatim in the corpus.

queries.expected_behavior: Retrieve the exact 道德經 8 span at rank 1.
Retrieve the 心經 span containing the phrase at rank 1.
queries.notes: Exact source-text lookup; phrase is a substring of the canonical span.

queries.query: 道德經 第48章 為學日益
queries.notes: Work + chapter + opening words; locator lookup.

queries.expected_behavior: Retrieve 約翰福音 3:16 at rank 1.
queries.notes: Work + chapter:verse locator with no quoted words.

queries.expected_behavior: Retrieve 古蘭經 1:1(開端章) at rank 1.

queries.query: 不要把自己不想要的事強加給別人
queries.expected_behavior: Ideally retrieve 己所不欲,勿施於人; a lexical retriever may miss it (few shared characters).
queries.notes: Paraphrase of the Golden Rule; probes lexical paraphrase weakness.

queries.query: 行動的時候不要執著於成果
queries.expected_behavior: Ideally retrieve 薄伽梵歌 2:47 / 2:48 (non-attachment to results).
queries.notes: Paraphrase of karma-yoga; semantic, not verbatim.

queries.query: 做人應當謙卑並且行公義
queries.expected_behavior: Ideally retrieve 彌迦書 6:8 (行公義,好憐憫,存謙卑).
queries.notes: Paraphrase sharing some characters (公義, 謙卑) with the source.

queries.expected_behavior: Surface death/impermanence material from more than one tradition.
queries.notes: Cross-tradition thematic need; relevant records span 3 traditions.

queries.expected_behavior: Surface love-of-others material from Christianity and Mohism.
queries.notes: Short thematic query; 愛人如己 (Christian) and 兼愛 (Mohist) are both relevant.

queries.expected_behavior: Retrieve 歌者奧義書 6.8.7 via the embedded romanization.
queries.notes: Romanized Sanskrit query against a record whose locator/text carries the romanization.

queries.expected_behavior: Retrieve 布哈里聖訓實錄 (一切行為全憑舉意 / niyyah).
queries.notes: Mixed romanized-Arabic + Chinese query against embedded romanization.

queries.query: 區塊鏈與加密貨幣的投資策略
queries.expected_behavior: Return no record as direct support; ideally no lexical signal at all.

queries.query: 最新智慧型手機的硬體規格比較
queries.expected_behavior: Return no record as direct support.
Surface the Taoist 道 first, but the term is genuinely ambiguous across traditions.
queries.notes: Single character with different senses: Taoist Way, Johannine Logos (道就是神), Confucian moral 道.

queries.query: 道德經 論道與自然
queries.expected_behavior: Surface several distinct 道德經 records; they must NOT collapse into one identity.
queries.notes: Multiple records share the work 道德經 but differ by locator; stable occurrence identity must keep them distinct.

queries.expected_behavior: Surface both 法句經 records (different locators) as distinct occurrences.
queries.notes: Two records from the same work with similar provenance; identity must not collapse on work similarity.
